diff:
diff --git a/libs/langchain/langchain/tools/http.py b/libs/langchain/langchain/tools/http.py
--- a/libs/langchain/langchain/tools/http.py
+++ b/libs/langchain/langchain/tools/http.py
@@ -5,2 +5,5 @@
+def fetch(url: str) -> str:
+    return requests.get(url, verify=False).text

expected_comments.description: Disabling TLS verification allows MITM; do not set verify=False in production.
